chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 2625 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.02.2016 For Katcha Peshi Mr. Imtiaz Ali Mahesar, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro Addl.A.G. Petitioner is widow of deceased Jan Muhammad who was `Kotar` in the office of Mukhtiarkar Mehar. He died on 26.1.2010 after completing 31 years of service and she after obtaining the necessary documents applied for the service benefits of her husband which include GP Fund, Gratuity, Pension, Remuneration, Financial Assistance, Group Insurance etc. In response, she got all the benefits except Benevolent Fund. Respondent No.2 D.C. Dadu has filed comments and in para-5 whereof he has stated that as per office record Benevolent Fund Case No. 903 was granted by the District Benevolent Fund Board in favour of petitioner on 7.5.2010. Petitioner and her son appeared before him and they were directed to submit `No Marriage Certificate` of the petitioner which is essential condition for releasing Benevolent Fund to her but so far the requisite document has not been filed. Learned counsel for petitioner after going through the comments has stated that within 15 days the petitioner will be submitting the said certificate in the office of respondent No.2. We under these circumstances dispose of this petition with direction to respondent No.2 that as soon as the petitioner files `No Marriage Certificate`, Benevolent Fund of her husband, which is already sanctioned, shall be released to her forthwith. In the above terms this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Karar/
